player.name: An Se-young
player.achievements: World No.1, 2024 Olympic Gold Medalist, 3x All England Champion
player.description: An Se-young is known for her exceptional technique, explosive power, and precise shot placement. Her biomechanics represent the gold standard for women's singles badminton.

data_source: Biomechanical analysis based on published sports science research on elite women's badminton players (Kim et al. 2020, Kwan et al. 2011, Rambely & Wan Abas 2008, Teu et al. 2006) and match video analysis of An Se-young's winning performances.

preparation.notes: Racket arm drawn back, elbow below shoulder, knees slightly bent in ready position, weight on back foot.

swing.notes: Arm rising overhead, shoulder rotating forward, knees bending deeply for explosive jump.

contact.notes: Full arm extension at highest point, elbow nearly straight, powerful wrist snap, body fully extended upward.

follow_through.notes: Arm follows natural deceleration path downward, weight shifting forward, balanced landing.

preparation.notes: Similar to smash preparation but slightly more relaxed stance.

contact.notes: High contact point with slightly less extension than smash, angled racket face for lift.

preparation.notes: Compact stance, racket held at mid-height, ready for fast flat exchange.

swing.notes: Short, fast swing at shoulder height, minimal backswing for speed.

contact.notes: Contact at shoulder height, arm moderately extended, flat racket face.

follow_through.notes: Quick recovery, compact follow-through for rapid next shot.

preparation.notes: Identical to smash/clear preparation to disguise the shot.

swing.notes: Mimics smash swing but with deceleration before contact.

contact.notes: Controlled contact with soft wrist, angled racket to gently push shuttle over net.

follow_through.notes: Gentle deceleration, arm stays relatively high.

preparation.notes: Low body position, deep lunge forward, racket extended in front.

swing.notes: Short, delicate swing, deep knee bend in lunge position.

contact.notes: Contact near net height, extended arm with soft touch, deep front lunge.

follow_through.notes: Minimal follow-through, quick push back to center court.
